__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Graphene Tape,Forbes List,Empress's Coronation Crown,Carmen
|rank=orange
|amount=4
|category=self
|description=Per 3 FTH Relics awakened, Snail HP +90; FTH Relics Awakened: 180/180
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by FTH Relics Awakened]]
